subject: [PATCH v6 2/2] selftests/firmware: add search path test for firmware_class.search_path=

2026-04-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a new selftest called fw_search.sh to the Linux kernel's firmware testing suite. The test validates the firmware_class.search_path= module parameter, which allows specifying multiple colon-separated firmware search directories. It covers various scenarios such as finding firmware in different search directories, not finding it at all, and handling edge cases like escaped colons and backslashes in directory names. The test also checks that sysfs readback matches what was written to the parameters. The patch includes a new Makefile entry for the fw_search.sh script and modifies the existing Makefile to include this new test.
